summary: This document serves as internal resume raw material summarizing KeepMeCompany's AI-powered healthcare platform for NHS GP practices. It details the product suite including intake, follow-up, and crisis detection systems, alongside the specific Python and Voice AI tech stack used. The content outlines regulatory status, operational metrics, and technical architecture for employee reference.
sniff_test_notes: Document explicitly labeled as 'Resume Raw Material' for employees; contains specific Twilio pricing and Voice IDs which may be sensitive operational data.
